name: M-111
events: 23 Sep 1941 M-111 mistakenly fires a torpedo against a Soviet transport ship south of the Crimea in position 44°10'N, 33°42'E. Fortunately the torpedo misses its target.
27 Nov 1942 At 1319 hours M-111 fires a torpedo at a German barge off Tulcea, Romania in position 45°55'N, 30°20'E. The torpedo misses its target.
At 1608 hours M-111 fires a torpedo at the German auxiliary submarine chasers Schiff 19/Lola and UJ 116/Xanten in position 45°57'N, 30°22'E. Once again the torpedo misses its target.
26 Dec 1942 M-111 attacks an enemy convoy off Cape Burnas in position 45°46'N, 30°12'E. Two torpedoes were fired that both found no target.
25 Apr 1943 M-111 fires a torpedo against the tug Woywoda and two barges near Sevastopol off Cape Feolent in position 44°24'N, 33°35'E. The torpedo missed.
18 May 1943 At 1326 hours M-111 fires a torpedo against 'what is identified as' a auxiliary patrol vessel off Anapa, Russia in position 44°57'N, 37°14'E. The torpedo missed its target.
At 1619 hours M-111 fires a torpedo against a convoy the German barges F 326, F 373 and F 470. Once again the torpedo did not find a target.
21 May 1943 M-111 fires a torpedo against the German barge F170 west of Anapa, Russia in position 45°03'N, 36°51'E. The torpedo missed its target.
22 May 1943 M-111 fires a torpedo against a German barge off Anapa, Russia. The torpedo missed its target.
28 Jun 1943 M-111 fires two torpedoes against a German barge off Sevastopol, Ukraine. The torpedoes missed their target.
17 Jul 1943 M-111 fires a torpedo against the German Adelheid off Feodosiya, Crimea, Ukraine in position 44°58'N, 35°45'E. The torpedo missed its target.
18 Jul 1943 M-111 torpedoed and sank the Romanian barge Dunarea I (505 GRT) off Feodosiya, Crimea, Ukraine in position 44°60'N, 35°32'E.
28 Aug 1943 M-111 torpedoed and sank the German tug Hainburg (400 GRT) off Cape Lukull, Crimea in position 44°47'N, 33°26'E.
6 Nov 1943 M-111 fires two torpedoes against 'what is identified as' a merchant of 3000 tons off Cape Burnas in position 45°49'N, 30°17'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
12 Nov 1943 M-111 torpedoed and sank the German merchant Theoderich (3814 GRT, former Soviet Volochayevka) off Cape Burnas in position 45°54'N, 30°23'E.
2 Dec 1943 M-111 fires two torpedoes against a convoy of barges off Cape Tarkhankut, Crimea in position 45°23'N, 32°28'E. Both torpedoes missed their targets.
17 Apr 1944 M-111 fires two torpedoes against the German merchant Helga (1620 GRT) east of Constanta, Romania in position 44°15'N, 30°25'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
22 Apr 1944 M-111 fires two torpedoes against the Romanian merchant Ardeal (5695 GRT) south-east of Constanta, Romania in position 43°45'N, 29°45'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
4 May 1944 M-111 fires two torpedoes against the Hungarian merchant Tisza (961 GRT) in the Black Sea in position 43°54'N, 32°12'E. Both torpedoes missed their target.
